description_long: This is a sleek, low-profile sports car with a striking gold exterior and a convertible roof, featuring sharp, angular lines and aggressive aerodynamic styling. The front end is characterized by narrow, angular headlights and prominent air intakes, while the rear showcases a sculpted engine cover and a pronounced diffuser. The car sits on large, multi-spoke alloy wheels with low-profile tires, and the side profile reveals deep air vents and a sharply rising beltline. The interior, visible from the open top, includes two bucket seats with sporty detailing and a minimalist dashboard. Black accents on the roof, mirrors, and lower body contrast with the gold paint, enhancing its dynamic appearance. The overall design suggests high performance and luxury, typical of an exotic supercar intended for urban and high-speed environments.
description: A gold, convertible sports car with sharp, angular lines, black accents, and large multi-spoke alloy wheels. Its aggressive styling and open cockpit highlight its high-performance, luxury character.
description_view_0: Front view shows the angular headlights, wide stance, and open cockpit with two bucket seats.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the deep side air vent, sharp beltline, and large alloy wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the sculpted engine cover, rear diffuser, and aggressive aerodynamic elements.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side vent, wheel design, and convertible roof details.
attribute_wheel_design: five-split-spoke alloy wheels with a machined finish and black accents
